items: Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Márquez
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Bond Program Consent Items
Approval of Construction Management Agreement Amendment #3 for Orion Alternative School (Formerly John Gill School) with RGM Kramer, Inc.
Redwood City School District Pedagogy of Confidence
Approval of the August 9th Board Minutes
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and Aequor Healthcare Services for SPED Teachers for the 2023-2024 School Year
Approval of the Memorandum of Understanding between Menlo Park School District and Redwood City School District
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and One Life Counseling to hire 20 contracted Therapists for the 2023-24 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and Contra Costa County Office of Education
Approval of the Caltronics Agreement for District-wide Copier/Printing Services
Approval of the Measure T and Measure S Citizens' Bond Oversight Committee Membership
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda announced. President stated 'And are there any changes to the agenda hearing? None.'
